column4: Confusing auth trust copy: free for travelers, honest price, vague support.
Auth form/layout visual issue: page looks crooked/awkward plus phone uniqueness note belongs to this area.
Traveler profile page: repeated profile/cabinet headings and possible second cursor/input glitch.
Hero claim “Зарабатывайте на авторских экскурсиях” should be removed; accreditation positioning needed.
Unrealistic guide benefits/income block should be removed or replaced with truthful accreditation flow.
Save button/layout overlap/spacing issue in guide profile form.
Saving “О себе” triggers guide_specializations_valid DB constraint; selected themes visible.
Wrong breadcrumb “Поездки > Россия > Москва”; not clickable and wrong public context.
Admin guide queue/action shows red failure card; admin cannot tell whether verification application arrived.
